message:
fix(reliability): add subprocess timeout and checkpoint overlap guard

ru-sync.service.ts:
- Add SUBPROCESS_TIMEOUT_MS (5 min) to prevent indefinite hangs
- Wrap proc.exited with Promise.race timeout
- Kill process and cleanup timeout properly

auto-checkpoint.service.ts:
- Add checkpointInProgress guard to prevent overlapping interval callbacks
- Use try-finally to ensure flag is always reset

bd-32q7j, bd-10x34

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
